Real client channel — you can verify the results yourself

View Andy's Channel

The Problem

A powerful coach — invisible online

Andy Anderson — a high-ticket business coach who had raised $500K+ at age 24 and scaled an 18-location gym chain — came to me with a YouTube channel sitting at just 11 subscribers. No content strategy. No optimization. No plan.

The channel had no professional bio, no proper layout, no SEO, and no consistent publishing. Despite being an authority in the coaching world, his YouTube presence was completely invisible to his ideal clients — coaches and entrepreneurs ready to scale.

His goal: build a YouTube-powered client acquisition system and eventually run paid ads to accelerate audience growth for his coaching brand, Relentless Education.

My Approach

A 3-phase YouTube growth system

Phase 1 · Month 1

Full channel setup & professional optimization

Rewrote channel bio, description, and layout to position Andy as a high-ticket business coach. Built a professional channel trailer, cleaned up branding, and set up SEO-optimized metadata across all existing content. Established the channel's core identity for his ideal audience.

Phase 2 · Month 1–3

Content strategy, publishing cadence & algorithm optimization

Built a consistent publishing system — long-form podcast episodes, YouTube Shorts, and guest interviews. Optimized every upload: titles, tags, thumbnails, descriptions, chapters, and cards aligned to YouTube's algorithm. Identified viral content opportunities through topic research and audience demand signals.

Phase 3 · Month 3–6

Multi-campaign YouTube Ads strategy

Launched geo-segmented YouTube Ads campaigns targeting USA, Australia, Canada & UK. Ran episode-specific campaigns, audience-match targeting, and email list retargeting campaigns. Achieved 2.71M impressions at avg $0.03 CPV — premium English-speaking audience reach at minimal cost per view.

SEO Optimization

Video SEO — Before 20 → After 80

Same video, optimized title, description, tags, and chapters. vidIQ SEO Score jumped from 20 to 80 — real screenshot proof below.

vidIQ SEO Score · Before: 20 → After: 80 · Same Video, Optimized

Every video, podcast episode, and Short was fully optimized with keyword-rich titles, descriptions, tags, chapters, and cards. Titles rewritten to match search intent. Tags selected for discoverability.

The Viral Moment

One video that changed everything

52K+
Views — Grant Mayo episode
17.8K
Unique viewers since published
+793
New subscribers from this video

"The $170 Million Dollar Man: Grant Mayo Exposes the Brutal Truth About Business"

This episode became the channel's breakout video — 9.1K total watch hours, 20:15 average view duration, and 17.8K unique viewers. Organic traffic poured in from YouTube Search and Suggested Videos, driving channel growth for months. Traffic sources: 8,036 views from Suggested Videos, 4,779 from YouTube Search, 4,608 from Browse Features — proof of strong algorithmic distribution.

Google Ads Dashboard · All Campaigns · 2.71M Impressions · 138K Views · Avg $0.03 CPV

"

I started with 11 subscribers and no plan. Within 6 months, we had over 4,300 subscribers, a viral video with 52,000+ views, YouTube ads running at $0.03 per view, and a channel my ideal clients actually discover me through. This wasn't luck — it was a system built from day one.

— Andy Anderson · Relentless Education · High-Ticket Business Coach · Australia

What made this work

  • Channel foundation first — professional bio, layout, branding, and SEO before any ad spend
  • Consistent publishing cadence — long-form podcasts, guest episodes, and Shorts in parallel
  • Every video optimized to YouTube's algorithm from day one — titles, tags, thumbnails, chapters
  • Paid ads introduced only after organic momentum was established — amplifying what already worked
  • Geo-targeted campaigns reaching premium English-speaking coaching audiences at just $0.03 CPV
  • Ongoing optimization each month — tracking analytics, adjusting strategy, improving performance

Want results like this for your channel?
